name: Barbarian

majors.name: Primal Path
majors.desc: Choose a Primal Path that shapes your rage.

minor_choices.name: Reaving Reason
minor_choices.desc: Choose your Reaving Reason, which defines how you channel your rage.

hit_points_at_higher_levels: 1d12 + your Constitution modifier per Barbarian level after 1st

martial_choices.name: Unarmored Defense
martial_choices.desc: While you are not wearing armor, your AC equals 10 + your Dexterity modifier + your Constitution modifier.

level_1_features.name: Rage
level_1_features.desc: As a bonus action, you can enter a rage. While raging, you have advantage on Strength checks and Strength saving throws, you gain +2 to melee damage rolls using Strength weapons, and you have resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage. Your rage lasts for 1 minute or until you fall unconscious or end it early. You can rage a number of times equal to 1 + your Constitution modifier.

level_1_features.name: Unarmored Defense
level_1_features.desc: While you are not wearing armor, your AC equals 10 + your Dexterity modifier + your Constitution modifier.

level_2_features.name: Reaving Reason
level_2_features.desc: Choose your Reaving Reason, which determines how your rage manifests and what benefits you gain while raging.

level_6_features.name: Relentless Rage
level_6_features.desc: When you drop to 0 hit points while raging, you make a DC 10 Constitution saving throw. On a success, you drop to 1 hit point instead.

level_10_features.name: Persistent Rage
level_10_features.desc: Your rage is so powerful that it ends early only if you fall unconscious or if you choose to end it.

level_14_features.name: Invincible
level_14_features.desc: While raging, you have resistance to all damage except psychic damage.

level_18_features.name: Primal Champion
level_18_features.desc: Your Strength and Constitution scores increase by 4, and your maximum for both increases by 4.

name: Bard

majors.name: Magical Secrets
majors.desc: Choose your Magical Secrets, which allows you to learn spells from any class list.

minor_choices.name: Inspiration
minor_choices.desc: Choose your Inspiration style, which determines how you inspire allies.

hit_points_at_higher_levels: 1d8 + your Charisma modifier per Bard level after 1st

martial_choices.name: Bardic Inspiration
martial_choices.desc: You can inspire others through words or music. As a bonus action, you can give one creature within 60 feet a Bardic Inspiration die (d6). The creature can roll the die and add the number rolled to any ability check, attack roll, or saving throw it makes within the next 10 minutes.

level_1_features.name: Bardic Inspiration
level_1_features.desc: You can inspire others through words or music. As a bonus action, you can give one creature within 60 feet a Bardic Inspiration die (d6). The creature can roll the die and add the number rolled to any ability check, attack roll, or saving throw it makes within the next 10 minutes.

level_1_features.name: Spellcasting
level_1_features.desc: You can cast spells using Charisma as your spellcasting ability. You know four 1st-level spells of your choice from the bard spell list.

level_2_features.name: Jack of All Trades
level_2_features.desc: You can add half your proficiency bonus, rounded down, to any ability check you make that doesn't already include your proficiency bonus.

level_2_features.name: Song of Rest
level_2_features.desc: You can use your bonus action to sing a song that grants creatures within 60 feet temporary hit points equal to your Bard level + your Charisma modifier when they roll Hit Dice.

level_6_features.name: Expert Diplomacy
level_6_features.desc: Your Bardic Inspiration die increases to d12, and you can use it on ability checks without proficiency.

level_10_features.name: Magical Secrets
level_10_features.desc: You learn two spells of your choice from any class list. These spells count as bard spells for you.

level_14_features.name: Counter-Charm
level_14_features.desc: You can use your reaction to counter a charm or fear effect targeting one creature within 30 feet.

level_18_features.name: Superior Inspiration
level_18_features.desc: When you roll initiative and have no uses of Bardic Inspiration left, you regain one use.

name: Cleric

majors.name: Divine Domain
majors.desc: Choose your Divine Domain, which shapes your divine magic and grants you additional features.

minor_choices.name: Channel Divinity
minor_choices.desc: Choose how you channel your divine power.

hit_points_at_higher_levels: 1d8 + your Wisdom modifier per Cleric level after 1st

martial_choices.name: Divine Fury
martial_choices.desc: Once on each of your turns when you hit a creature with an attack roll, you can deal extra radiant damage equal to your Cleric level.

level_1_features.name: Spellcasting
level_1_features.desc: You can cast spells using Wisdom as your spellcasting ability. You prepare a number of spells equal to your Wisdom modifier + your Cleric level.

level_1_features.name: Divine Domain
level_1_features.desc: Choose your Divine Domain, which grants you domain spells and additional features at 1st level.

level_2_features.name: Channel Divinity
level_2_features.desc: You can channel divine energy to produce one of two effects chosen from your Divine Domain.

level_2_features.name: Divine Fury
level_2_features.desc: Once on each of your turns when you hit a creature with an attack roll, you can deal extra radiant damage equal to your Cleric level.

level_6_features.name: Divine Strike
level_6_features.desc: Once on each of your turns when you hit a creature with an attack roll, you can deal extra damage to the target.

level_10_features.name: Divine Intervention
level_10_features.desc: You can call upon your deity to intervene on your behalf. When you use this feature, roll a d20. On a 10 or higher, your deity intervenes.

level_14_features.name: Portent of the Gods
level_14_features.desc: You can use your reaction to force a creature within 60 feet to reroll an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw.

level_18_features.name: Divine Champion
level_18_features.desc: Once on each of your turns when you hit a creature with an attack roll, you can deal extra force damage equal to your Cleric level.

name: Druid

majors.name: Circle
majors.desc: Choose your Circle, which shapes your druidic magic and grants you additional features.

minor_choices.name: Wild Shape
minor_choices.desc: Choose how you transform into beasts.

hit_points_at_higher_levels: 1d8 + your Wisdom modifier per Druid level after 1st

martial_choices.name: Druidic Sense
martial_choices.desc: You can sense the presence of beasts, plants, and natural phenomena within 30 feet.

level_1_features.name: Spellcasting
level_1_features.desc: You can cast spells using Wisdom as your spellcasting ability. You prepare a number of spells equal to your Wisdom modifier + your Druid level.

level_1_features.name: Druidic
level_1_features.desc: You know the Druidic language and can communicate with other druids using it.

level_2_features.name: Wild Shape
level_2_features.desc: You can use your action to transform into a beast you have seen, with a CR of 1 or lower (no flying or swimming speeds).

level_2_features.name: Druidic Sense
level_2_features.desc: You can sense the presence of beasts, plants, and natural phenomena within 30 feet.

level_6_features.name: Wild Shape Improvement
level_6_features.desc: Your Wild Shape now allows beasts with flying or swimming speeds, and you can maintain your spellcasting ability while transformed.

level_10_features.name: Timeless Body
level_10_features.desc: You can't age, and you have resistance to poison damage.

level_14_features.name: Wild Magic
level_14_features.desc: Your spells cast through Wild Shape have enhanced effects, and you can cast spells while in beast form.

level_18_features.name: Archdruid
level_18_features.desc: You can use Wild Shape an unlimited number of times, and you can cast spells while transformed.

name: Fighter

majors.name: Combat Archetype
majors.desc: Choose your Combat Archetype, which defines your fighting style and grants additional features.

minor_choices.name: Second Wind
minor_choices.desc: Choose how you use your Second Wind ability.

hit_points_at_higher_levels: 1d10 + your Constitution modifier per Fighter level after 1st

martial_choices.name: Fighting Style
martial_choices.desc: Choose your Fighting Style, which enhances your combat abilities.

level_1_features.name: Second Wind
level_1_features.desc: As a bonus action, you can regain hit points equal to 1d10 + your Fighter level.

level_1_features.name: Fighting Style
level_1_features.desc: Choose your Fighting Style, which enhances your combat abilities.

level_2_features.name: Combat Archetype
level_2_features.desc: Choose your Combat Archetype, which defines your fighting style and grants additional features at 2nd level.

level_2_features.name: Action Surge
level_2_features.desc: You can push yourself beyond your normal limits. Once on each of your turns, you can take one additional action.

level_6_features.name: Martial Advantage
level_6_features.desc: When you hit a creature with an attack roll, you can grant advantage on the next attack roll against that creature before the end of your next turn.

level_10_features.name: Indomitable
level_10_features.desc: When you fail a saving throw, you can use your reaction to reroll it.

level_14_features.name: Superior Indomitable
level_14_features.desc: You can use Indomitable twice before needing to finish a long rest.

level_18_features.name: Archfighter
level_18_features.desc: Your Action Surge can be used twice before needing to finish a long rest, and your Second Wind heals an additional 1d10 hit points.

name: Monk

majors.name: Monastic Order
majors.desc: Choose your Monastic Order, which shapes your martial arts and grants additional features.

minor_choices.name: Ki
minor_choices.desc: Choose how you channel your ki energy.

hit_points_at_higher_levels: 1d8 + your Dexterity modifier per Monk level after 1st

martial_choices.name: Unarmored Defense
martial_choices.desc: While you are not wearing armor or wielding a shield, your AC equals 10 + your Dexterity modifier + your Wisdom modifier.

level_1_features.name: Unarmored Defense
level_1_features.desc: While you are not wearing armor or wielding a shield, your AC equals 10 + your Dexterity modifier + your Wisdom modifier.

level_1_features.name: Martial Arts
level_1_features.desc: You can use Dexterity instead of Strength for attack and damage rolls with monk weapons. Your unarmed strike damage die becomes a d4.

level_2_features.name: Ki
level_2_features.desc: You have ki points equal to your Monk level. You can spend ki points to enhance your martial abilities.

level_2_features.name: Monastic Order
level_2_features.desc: Choose your Monastic Order, which grants additional features at 2nd level.

level_6_features.name: Slow Fall
level_6_features.desc: You can use your reaction to reduce falling damage by an amount equal to your Monk level + your Dexterity modifier.

level_10_features.name: Diamond Soul
level_10_features.desc: You have advantage on saving throws against spells, and you can use your reaction to add your Monk level to an ability check.

level_14_features.name: Empty Body
level_14_features.desc: You can use your action to become invisible and immune to nonmagical damage for 1 minute.

level_18_features.name: Timeless Body
level_18_features.desc: You can't age, and you have resistance to poison damage.

name: Paladin

majors.name: Oath
majors.desc: Choose your Oath, which defines your paladinic duties and grants additional features.

minor_choices.name: Divine Sense
minor_choices.desc: Choose how you use your Divine Sense ability.

hit_points_at_higher_levels: 1d10 + your Charisma modifier per Paladin level after 1st

martial_choices.name: Divine Sense
martial_choices.desc: As an action, you can detect celestials, fiends, and undead within 30 feet.

level_1_features.name: Divine Sense
level_1_features.desc: As an action, you can detect celestials, fiends, and undead within 30 feet.

level_1_features.name: Lay on Hands
level_1_features.desc: You have a pool of healing power equal to 5 × your Paladin level. You can use an action to restore hit points to a creature.

level_2_features.name: Fighting Style
level_2_features.desc: Choose your Fighting Style, which enhances your combat abilities.

level_2_features.name: Spellcasting
level_2_features.desc: You can cast spells using Charisma as your spellcasting ability. You prepare a number of spells equal to half your Paladin level + your Charisma modifier.

level_6_features.name: Aura of Protection
level_6_features.desc: You and friendly creatures within 10 feet gain a bonus to saving throws equal to your Charisma modifier.

level_10_features.name: Aura of Courage
level_10_features.desc: You and friendly creatures within 10 feet have advantage on saving throws against being frightened.

level_14_features.name: Improved Divine Smite
level_14_features.desc: When you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack, the target takes an extra 1d8 radiant damage.

level_18_features.name: Divine Champion
level_18_features.desc: Once on each of your turns when you hit a creature with an attack roll, you can deal extra radiant damage equal to your Paladin level.

name: Ranger

majors.name: Ranger Concept
majors.desc: Choose your Ranger Concept, which defines your approach to survival and combat.

minor_choices.name: Favored Enemy
minor_choices.desc: Choose your Favored Enemy, which grants you special abilities against specific creature types.

hit_points_at_higher_levels: 1d10 + your Wisdom modifier per Ranger level after 1st

martial_choices.name: Fighting Style
martial_choices.desc: Choose your Fighting Style, which enhances your combat abilities.

level_1_features.name: Favored Enemy
level_1_features.desc: Choose your Favored Enemy, which grants you special abilities against specific creature types.

level_1_features.name: Natural Explorer
level_1_features.desc: You gain special abilities based on your chosen terrain type.

level_2_features.name: Fighting Style
level_2_features.desc: Choose your Fighting Style, which enhances your combat abilities.

level_2_features.name: Spellcasting
level_2_features.desc: You can cast spells using Wisdom as your spellcasting ability. You prepare a number of spells equal to half your Ranger level + your Wisdom modifier.

level_6_features.name: Primeval Awareness
level_6_features.desc: You can use your action to sense the presence of beasts, plants, and natural phenomena within 30 feet.

level_10_features.name: Hide in Plain Sight
level_10_features.desc: You can use your action to become invisible and immune to nonmagical damage for 1 minute.

level_14_features.name: Soul of the Wild
level_14_features.desc: You can cast spells while in beast form, and your Wild Shape duration is doubled.

level_18_features.name: Vanishing
level_18_features.desc: Once on each of your turns when you hit a creature with an attack roll, you can use your reaction to become invisible until the start of your next turn.

name: Rogue

majors.name: Rogue Archetype
majors.desc: Choose your Rogue Archetype, which defines your specialty and grants additional features.

minor_choices.name: Sneak Attack
minor_choices.desc: Choose how you use your Sneak Attack ability.

hit_points_at_higher_levels: 1d8 + your Dexterity modifier per Rogue level after 1st

martial_choices.name: Sneak Attack
martial_choices.desc: Once on each of your turns when you hit a creature with an attack roll using a finesse or ranged weapon, you can deal extra damage equal to 3d6.

level_1_features.name: Sneak Attack
level_1_features.desc: Once on each of your turns when you hit a creature with an attack roll using a finesse or ranged weapon, you can deal extra damage equal to 3d6.

level_1_features.name: Thieves' Cant
level_1_features.desc: You know the thieves' cant, a secret language used by rogues.

level_2_features.name: Rogue Archetype
level_2_features.desc: Choose your Rogue Archetype, which grants additional features at 2nd level.

level_2_features.name: Cunning Action
level_2_features.desc: You can use your bonus action to take the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action.

level_6_features.name: Reliable Blunder
level_6_features.desc: When you roll a 1 on an attack roll, you can treat it as a 2 instead.

level_10_features.name: Elusive
level_10_features.desc: No ability check or saving throw can give advantage against you, and you have resistance to all damage.

level_14_features.name: Stroke of Luck
level_14_features.desc: Once on each of your turns when you miss with an attack roll or fail an ability check, you can use your reaction to add your Rogue level to the d20 roll.

level_18_features.name: Unfair Advantage
level_18_features.desc: When you have advantage on an attack roll, you can use your reaction to force the target to make a Dexterity saving throw or be stunned until the end of your next turn.

name: Sorcerer

majors.name: Sorcerous Origin
majors.desc: Choose your Sorcerous Origin, which defines the source of your magical power.

minor_choices.name: Metamagic
minor_choices.desc: Choose how you modify your spells.

hit_points_at_higher_levels: 1d6 + your Charisma modifier per Sorcerer level after 1st

martial_choices.name: Sorcerous Power
martial_choices.desc: You can use your Charisma to enhance your spellcasting abilities.

level_1_features.name: Sorcerous Origin
level_1_features.desc: Choose your Sorcerous Origin, which defines the source of your magical power.

level_1_features.name: Spellcasting
level_1_features.desc: You can cast spells using Charisma as your spellcasting ability. You know four 1st-level spells of your choice from the sorcerer spell list.

level_2_features.name: Metamagic
level_2_features.desc: You can use Metamagic to modify your spells. You know two Metamagic options.

level_2_features.name: Sorcerous Restoration
level_2_features.desc: You regain expended spell slots when you finish a short rest.

level_6_features.name: Empowered Spell
level_6_features.desc: When you roll damage for a spell, you can use your reaction to reroll up to 3 of the dice.

level_10_features.name: Sorcerous Strength
level_10_features.desc: You can use your Charisma modifier instead of your spellcasting ability modifier for spell attack rolls and spell save DC.

level_14_features.name: Twin Spell
level_14_features.desc: When you cast a spell that targets only one creature, you can use your reaction to target another creature with the same spell.

level_18_features.name: Magical Origins
level_18_features.desc: You can use your Metamagic without expending sorcery points, and your spell slots recover on a short rest.

name: Warlock

majors.name: Pact of the Patron
majors.desc: Choose your Patron, which defines your warlock magic and grants additional features.

minor_choices.name: Eldritch Blast
minor_choices.desc: Choose how you use your Eldritch Blast cantrip.

hit_points_at_higher_levels: 1d8 + your Charisma modifier per Warlock level after 1st

martial_choices.name: Eldritch Blast
martial_choices.desc: Your Eldritch Blast cantrip is your signature attack. You can enhance it with invocations.

level_1_features.name: Pact of the Patron
level_1_features.desc: Choose your Patron, which defines your warlock magic and grants additional features.

level_1_features.name: Spellcasting
level_1_features.desc: You can cast spells using Charisma as your spellcasting ability. You know four 1st-level spells of your choice from the warlock spell list.

level_2_features.name: Eldritch Blast
level_2_features.desc: Your Eldritch Blast cantrip is your signature attack. You can enhance it with invocations.

level_2_features.name: Pact Boon
level_2_features.desc: Choose your Pact Boon, which grants you additional abilities.

level_6_features.name: Mystic Arcana
level_6_features.desc: You can use your reaction to force a creature within 60 feet to reroll an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw.

level_10_features.name: Eldritch Mastery
level_10_features.desc: You can use your Charisma modifier instead of your spellcasting ability modifier for spell attack rolls and spell save DC.

level_14_features.name: Celestial Presence
level_14_features.desc: Once on each of your turns when you hit a creature with an attack roll, you can use your reaction to force the target to make a Charisma saving throw or be charmed until the end of your next turn.

level_18_features.name: Divine Pact
level_18_features.desc: Your spell slots recover on a short rest, and you can use your Pact Boon an unlimited number of times.

name: Wizard

majors.name: School of Magic
majors.desc: Choose your School of Magic, which defines your magical specialty and grants additional features.

minor_choices.name: Spellbook
minor_choices.desc: Choose how you organize your spellbook.

hit_points_at_higher_levels: 1d6 + your Intelligence modifier per Wizard level after 1st

martial_choices.name: Arcane Recovery
martial_choices.desc: Once on each of your turns when you cast a spell, you can use your reaction to regain spell slots.

level_1_features.name: Spellcasting
level_1_features.desc: You can cast spells using Intelligence as your spellcasting ability. You prepare a number of spells equal to your Intelligence modifier + your Wizard level.

level_1_features.name: Arcane Recovery
level_1_features.desc: Once on each of your turns when you cast a spell, you can use your reaction to regain spell slots.

level_2_features.name: School of Magic
level_2_features.desc: Choose your School of Magic, which grants additional features at 2nd level.

level_2_features.name: Spellbook
level_2_features.desc: You have a spellbook containing all your wizard spells. You can add spells to your spellbook by copying them from other sources.

level_6_features.name: Arcane Ward
level_6_features.desc: You can use your reaction to create a ward that absorbs damage for you and your allies.

level_10_features.name: Spell-Storing Reservoir
level_10_features.desc: You can store spells in your spellbook and cast them later without preparing them.

level_14_features.name: Signature Spells
level_14_features.desc: You can choose two spells from your spellbook to be signature spells. You can cast them using a bonus action.

level_18_features.name: Archmage
level_18_features.desc: You can cast spells without expending spell slots, and your spell save DC increases by 2.
